text: FSx for Lustre @ rstencnatis @ s * Managed Lustre - Designed for HPC - LINUX Clients (POSIX) * Machine Learning, Big Data, Financial Modelling ¢ 100’s GB/s throughput & sub millisecond latency * Deployment types - Persistent or Scratch e Scratch - Highly optimised for Short term no replication & fast * Persistent - longer term, HA (in one AZ), self-healing e Accessible over VPN or Direct Connect
